programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: A devious tech wizard (Daniel Radcliffe) forces the illusionists (Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson) known as the Four Horsemen to steal a powerful chip that can control all of the world's computers.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: Retired CIA agents (Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich) reassemble for survival after the agency sends assassins to silence them and the secrets they carry.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his team battle assassins, terrorists and power-hungry government officials as they try to retrieve a lethal device that could change the balance of world power.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his team battle assassins, terrorists and power-hungry government officials as they try to retrieve a lethal device that could change the balance of world power.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: A federal agent (Mark Ruffalo) and an Interpol detective (Mélanie Laurent) play a cat-and-mouse game with cunning illusionists who rob corrupt business leaders during their performances, then funnel the money to members of the audience.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: A devious tech wizard (Daniel Radcliffe) forces the illusionists (Jesse Eisenberg, Woody Harrelson) known as the Four Horsemen to steal a powerful chip that can control all of the world's computers.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A map written in Latin leads a slain pirate's daughter (Geena Davis) and her partner (Matthew Modine) to gold and into battle with a murderous uncle (Frank Langella).

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A map written in Latin leads a slain pirate's daughter (Geena Davis) and her partner (Matthew Modine) to gold and into battle with a murderous uncle (Frank Langella).

programme.title: The Wraith
programme.desc: The mysterious driver (Charlie Sheen) of a turbocharged domestic car drag-races an Arizona hot rodder (Nick Cassavetes) in the desert.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiable hunger for power.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: The world stands on the brink of annihilation when a mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and sends it hurtling toward Earth. With only weeks before impact, three unlikely heroes team up for a dangerous mission into space to save humanity.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: The world stands on the brink of annihilation when a mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and sends it hurtling toward Earth. With only weeks before impact, three unlikely heroes team up for a dangerous mission into space to save humanity.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot (Jake Gyllenhaal) takes part in a secret government program that enables him to assume someone's identity and experience the last few minutes of that person's life.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: The Miracle Season
programme.desc: Caroline "Line" Found is the star player and captain of the volleyball team at West High School in Iowa City, Iowa. Her tragic death in an accident inspires Caroline's coach and teammates to band together to try to win the state championship.

programme.title: The Ride
programme.desc: Released from juvenile detention, a troubled teen enters the world of extreme BMX bike riding with help from his foster father.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Building the Next Stage of Test Sled
programme.desc: Mike and Pat move to the next stages of the Test Sled build including top end performance goodies, racing seats, an accessory drive, and custom tail lights.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA's inaugural SPEC Mustang class. We'll take a 2008 Mustang GT and begin getting it ready for this entry level, but competitive class.

programme.title: HorsePower
programme.sub-title: Buttoning Up and Tuning the 427 Stroker in Our Thunderbird Sleeper
programme.desc: Time again to wake up Project "Deep Sleep" - HorsePower's '97 T-bird hiding a 427 cubic inch small block beast. Today, the guys put final touches on their stealthy, Mustang and Camaro killer.

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.sub-title: Put Up or Shut Up: Does Our Upgraded Duramax GMC Denali Deliver At the Strip?
programme.desc: After months in the shop the Duramax in our Sierra Denali gets fired after the cooling issues are solved. Then on to the dyno for a custom tune before it hits the dragstrip.

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.sub-title: Put Up or Shut Up: Does Our Upgraded Duramax GMC Denali Deliver At the Strip?
programme.desc: After months in the shop the Duramax in our Sierra Denali gets fired after the cooling issues are solved. Then on to the dyno for a custom tune before it hits the dragstrip.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: We help one of our viewers take care of some essential safety items on her '99 Chevy Z71.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: How To Lift And Level Your Truck For More Clearance
programme.desc: When adding bigger wheels and tires to your vehicle may cause some problems with clearance. We show you some quick solutions to get you rolling again.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Adding Candy Color To The '71 Chevy Caprice - Fat Stack Part 5
programme.desc: We slap on a fresh coat of paint to help transform our '71 Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine! Then, we add a new vinyl top and marry the body back to the frame to bring Fat Stack one step closer to the finish line.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Creating Big Aero Gains in our Autocross Camaro
programme.desc: Part 3 of the Autocross Camaro Build. A 25th Anniversary Camaro transforms into an autocross machine. A custom spoiler, and an affordable splitter makes this muscle car ready for the track.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Road Burner is back and heating up the highway as Tommy and Joel hit the road for Holley's MoParty. Before they leave, they have a surprise up their sleeve for you die-cast car fans. Things are about to heat up!

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Turn Back Time and Prep for the Future
programme.desc: Recap and Forecast on the projects we have in the shop. Install new drivetrain and chassis on Buick Project Street Regal.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Will This Junkyard 1977 C-30 Square Body Tow Truck Start?
programme.desc: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication and a little imagination.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Project Hard Charger gets the front end buttoned up and we help a viewer restore his cranky Camaro.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: In-Depth Build Of An Old School Chevy 4.3L V6 Build Part 2
programme.desc: Once we install ported cylinder heads, upgraded valvetrain, and induction...the 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Building An Exhaust To Fit The Abandoned Chevy Silverado's 5.3L LS - Part 3
programme.desc: We continue to work on our abandoned '96 Chevy Silverado truck, buttoning up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations. Plus we build a custom exhaust for our freshened up 5.3 liter engine.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Faux Guy Square Body Screams '80s With Chrome Wagon Wheels
programme.desc: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted. We add a new fuel system and assemble it all back together. We get this K-10 chassis on a new set of wheels and tires and add our freshly painted cab.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Swapping In A Performance Clutch On The Spec Miata Racecar - Part 3
programme.desc: The crew starts tearing into the drivetrain and suspension of their Spec Mazda Miata racecar to help it perform better on the track.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Swapping In A Performance Clutch On The Spec Miata Racecar - Part 3
programme.desc: The crew starts tearing into the drivetrain and suspension of their Spec Mazda Miata racecar to help it perform better on the track.

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.desc: Project Lo 'n Slo is what we called our '65 Fleetside Chevy C10. With a beautiful patina, we leave the body to mother nature, but ditch the 350 small block for a unique 292 straight-six with a turbo.

programme.title: HorsePower
programme.sub-title: Buttoning Up and Tuning the 427 Stroker in Our Thunderbird Sleeper
programme.desc: Time again to wake up Project "Deep Sleep" - HorsePower's '97 T-bird hiding a 427 cubic inch small block beast. Today, the guys put final touches on their stealthy, Mustang and Camaro killer.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.desc: It's bedtime! Today, Eric and Joel are laying down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350-Project Nightshift. We'll address the fuel system and core support, and slap on an all-new exhaust, getting us one step closer to the finish line.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Tearing Down and Rebuilding a Kingpin Dana 60 Axle

programme.sub-title: Firing Up a 396 Big Block in a 1970 Camaro RS/SS

programme.desc: The Drifting Trailblazer gets more muscle under the hood, and the exterior gets a new drift car look.

programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to New Orleans. Carissa Cropper knows she's the problem in her love life, Shaddy McCoy admits New Orleans has issues, and Arron "AO" Odom relays a conversation he heard between third-graders.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to Cleveland. Rob Ward remembers trying to stop a robbery, Mike Polk Jr. compares first and second weddings, and Nelsin Davis pleads for Cleveland to fix its potholes.

programme.title: Jeremy Nunes - Neighborhood Sasq-Watch
programme.desc: Jeremy Nunes has drawn rave reviews from critics for his clever observations, unique storytelling style, and ability to improvise with his audience.

programme.title: Andy Woodhull - World's Greatest Step Dad
Brandon Vestal - Who?
programme.desc: "Brandon Vestal's low key, deeply personal and honest style has made him a fast favorite in the comedy world, a "Don't Miss" for college audiences, and a club favorite. He puts on an amazing show and is a definite must see."

programme.title: Don Barnhart - The Spinal Disintegration of Man
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: Paul Sheffield - Singled Out
programme.desc: Paul has been doing comedy since 2008 and has been headlining in Utah, Idaho, and Wyoming. He has a CD on iTunes Sheffield Had it Worse" Winner of 2010 Happy Valley Comedy Competition.

programme.title: Brad Bonar - The Comedy and Magic of Brad Bonar
Eric O Shea - Life: It's Not Your Fault
Tony Deyo - Sleep When The Baby Sleeps
Jeff Jena - Old Dog, New Jokes
programme.desc: Jeffrey Jena is one of the top corporate and cruise comics working today. His thirty-three years of live performance experience and over forty national television shows, both as an actor and comic give him the ability to work for any audience

programme.title: Tony Deyo - Sleep When The Baby Sleeps
Jim Mccue - Nothing Personal
programme.desc: With his unique act, Jim keeps the audience on its toes. Volleying between set material and working the crowd, Jim cracks jokes with amazing timing and whip-like precision. A unique blend that is sure to leave the audience roaring with laughter!

programme.title: Reno Collier - Monkeys and Stuff
programme.desc: Reno's journey began at the Punchline Comedy Club in Atlanta, GA where he tended bar to supplement his day job. He found himself on stage during the weekly open mic night. His unique outlook on life - mixed with a six-pack, was instantly popular.

programme.title: Jordan Makin - The BFFG (The Big Fat Funny Ginger)
Mark Poolos - One Wife, Two Daughters, and Zero Influence
Kevin Jordan - Cause I Said So
programme.desc: A Former Los Angeles Police Officer, Kevin has thrilled audiences at Clubs, on Cruise ships, and for the troops worldwide. Kevin is also an Award-winning author, who has opened for John Legend and Gladys Knight.

programme.title: Lee Hardin - Not Quite a Grown-Up
programme.desc: Lee Hardin is a comedian known for making bad decisions and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: JJ Barrows - Doodle All Day
programme.desc: JJ Barrows was raised in South Carolina as the middle child of a preacher's family. Having always felt a little different, JJ uses humor to navigate through the realities of life.

programme.title: Seth Tippetts - Tall. Dark. Gigante
programme.desc: Get to know Seth from the chest down. He's big, he's tall, but most of all he's hilarious. Check out this Utah-raised, clean, and semi-professional comedian today!

programme.title: Dennis Regan - Dennisland
programme.desc: The King Of Queens writer Dennis Regan comes swinging hard with his quick wit and flawless delivery. The laughs just keep on coming in "Dennisland".

programme.title: Ross Bennett - Comedy! ... for the rest of us
programme.desc: A popular headliner at comedy clubs worldwide, veteran comedian (and btw, he's also a veteran!), Ross Bennett has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, and, along with countless other TV appearances.

programme.title: Chris Cope - Baby Face
programme.desc: Chris Cope, a Florida transplant now living in LA. The city has been good to Chris in just 4 short years he's appeared on Jimmy Kimmel Live, Tosh.O, Laughs on Fox. He's acted in feature films and also appeared on the hit ABC TV Show "Grey's Anatomy".

programme.title: Cam Bertrand - Sophisticated Ignorance
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Food writer Rachel Khoo takes Fred to Vienna to experience exquisite coffee and cake, comforting dumplings, and mangalitza pork schnitzel.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves home made samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: Portland is one of the best food cities in the world and Katchka is a foodie extravaganza. David stalks the pacific northwest woods for salmon and the most expensive mushroom in the world to recreate an amazing post-Soviet meal.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: The swampy everglades and the warm blue water of south Florida call to David as he farms, fishes and hunts to recreate a Cuban American meal at Amelia 1931. But by far the scariest harvest on the menu is fishing for alligator.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: It's raining pecans in Texas, but David faces challenges finding other key ingredients and is forced to hunt alone for the first time.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: French cuisine is world renown and David is working with one of the best of the best this week, Mauro Colagreco. But things go sideways scalloping in the freezing north Atlantic, trying to harvest Caviar and turning the best butter in the world.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Restaurateur Thomasina Miers takes Fred to South Wales to explore some wild places to eat from an ancient inn to a beachside restaurant and wood fired cooking.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: Portland is one of the best food cities in the world and Katchka is a foodie extravaganza. David stalks the pacific northwest woods for salmon and the most expensive mushroom in the world to recreate an amazing post-Soviet meal.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: The swampy everglades and the warm blue water of south Florida call to David as he farms, fishes and hunts to recreate a Cuban American meal at Amelia 1931. But by far the scariest harvest on the menu is fishing for alligator.

programme.title: From Scratch
programme.desc: It's raining pecans in Texas, but David faces challenges finding other key ingredients and is forced to hunt alone for the first time.

programme.title: Bear Grylls' Biggest Adventures in Britain
programme.desc: Bear goes to North Wales, and the glorious mountains of Snowdonia, a landscape shaped by volcanic eruptions and shattering continental fractures; Bear starts his adventure by crossing Cardigan Bay, which at 50-miles wide is the largest bay in Wales.

programme.title: Bear Grylls' Biggest Adventures in Britain
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls explores British adventures and the country's extreme landscapes. In episode two, Bear reveals the tropical past of the Yorkshire Dales while abseiling at Malham Cove.

programme.title: Bear Grylls' Biggest Adventures in Britain
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls explores British adventures and the country's extreme landscapes; Bear journeys from the deepest point in Britain to the highest peak in the Highlands.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a Father and Son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the'Land Of Eternal Spring!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Exploring The 'Wet Market' Of Nha Trang
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang- a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Chili Sauce in Hoi An
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hoi An. He visits a family who has been making chilli sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bomb shells.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Seafood With A Bang, Here In Da Nang
programme.desc: On this stop of his Vietnam journey, Luke visits the bustling seaside city of Da Nang. Join him as he visits the spectacular Dragon Bridge, looks up some succulent shimp on the beach, and stumbles upon a tiny fishing village packed with restaurants.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke visits Huê- famous for its heritage and cuisine and Con Hen Village to learn a technique for de-shelling baby clams, searches for best bowl of spicy beef noodle soup, and stops by a business where they they make turmeric vermicelli noodle salad!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Tasty Ant Eggs in Ninh Binh
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Searching For The Banh Da Noodle in Hai Phong
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delcious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delcious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vitenamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favourite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chilli Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: More than 30 years after the Chernobyl nuclear disaster, the team journeys back in to time to witness the horror scenes from that deadly night.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: Explore a space shuttle that was designed and abandoned in Kazakhstan's deserts in the years when human beings started their adventure in space.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: Hidden in the forests of Berlin lies Heilstätte Grabowsee Sanatorium waiting for its next patients to arrive.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: In Germany, Spreepark sits abandoned after becoming entangled in a drug smuggling operation.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: St. George's Church earned its name after a tragic accident convinced locals that it was haunted by spirits from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: In the aftermath of World War II, witness the graveyard of victorious airplanes and the extraterrestrial-like monument in the Bulgarian mountains.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia

programme.desc: Officers dress a naked man who is causing a disturbance, a barefoot man denies evading police, and an intoxicated woman and her husband tell two different stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Special Operations Unit coordinates a city-wide “buy bust” sting designed to apprehend street level drug dealers. Officers join units in pursuit of a stolen SUV. An officer arrests two brothers for public intoxication.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tackles a masked man with an outstanding warrant, an erratic driver is stopped driving to a nail salon, and police respond to a domestic assault involving hot wax.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dispensary security guard is shot by an angry client who dropped his ID. A woman is injured when she crashes a stolen car into a tree. A man barricades himself inside an apartment with his mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Cindy Kroger suddenly becomes popular thanks to a magical love potion; the librarians must stop Cindy before she launches a love missile that would force the entire world to become her fan base.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians are led to a holistic spa that is run by vampires when a rash of people spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The balance of the universe is put in jeopardy when the Monkey King's sacred homeland of Shangri-La is taken over by a ruthless collector of magical artifacts.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The library is simultaneously infiltrated by DOSA and Apep; Flynn, Baird, Stone, Cassandra, Ezekiel and Jenkins must put aside their differences to save the library, the world and themselves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: A secret sect of the Vatican Church unearths a map detailing the locations of the four cornerstones of the Library of Alexandria; Flynn and the Librarians work with an unexpected ally to stop them before the stones can be used to destroy the Library.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When people begin getting hurt in the unluckiest of ways, the Librarians follow the trail to a casino where the owner appears to possess an artifact capable of stealing people's luck.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Santa takes Flynn, Baird and Jenkins on his first vacation in centuries; the Librarians use Santa's sleigh to save Ezekiel's career-criminal mother, as well as Christmas itself, from Santa's grinch of a brother, the Patron Saint of Thieves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Drawn into the world of Baird's favorite film noir movie, the Librarians must perfect their skills in lassoing, sharpshooting and snappy dialogue to make it out alive.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn is excited to team up with his Librarian hero, Darrington Dare, to take down an ancient and powerful enemy let loose in the modern day; Darrington leaves the Librarians with a dire warning that there can only be one Librarian.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When Baird goes after Nicole Noone in an attempt to repair her rift with the Library, she winds up joining Nicole on a mission to retrieve a dangerous artifact before it falls into the hands of Russian grave robbers.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When dissension threatens the group, Baird takes the Librarians to a charismatic self-help guru's team-building camp on the edge of a forest where people have been mysteriously disappearing.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Cassandra decides to take a vacation after she freezes up during a mission; during her visit to Havenport, labeled the "Safest Town in America," Cassandra believes things may not be as ideal as they seem.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When a town's Civil War re-enactment is plagued by ghosts, the Librarians have to uncover the truth of what really happened there over 100 years ago.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: After switching bodies with a 28-year-old slacker named Jeff, Jenkins enlists the help of Jeff's hapless friends to find his way back into the Library to correct the mistake.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Trial of the One
programme.desc: It's time to choose the Librarian who will be tethered to Baird, but no one can decide, so the Library comes up with a trial during which the Librarians will be reduced to their most primal selves and abandoned in nightmarish landscapes.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The world is morphed into an unrecognizable place where the Library never existed; Baird brings the Librarians together in an attempt to prevent the bleak, new world from becoming the new reality.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Crown of King Arthur
programme.desc: When someone begins killing off potential librarians, Flynn Carsen and Col. Eve Baird must save the three that are left.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Sword in the Stone
programme.desc: Flynn, Col. Baird and the potential librarians must stop the Serpent Brotherhood from returning magic to the world.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Horns of a Dilemma
programme.desc: The librarians' first solo mission hits a snag when Baird loses the others in a magical labyrinth that exists below a skyscraper.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the Serpent Brotherhood wants to kill Santa, the librarians must rescue him and help him accomplish the secret purpose of Christmas.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the dragons sleeping beneath the earth threaten to awaken, Flynn returns to help find their hidden treasure.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians travel to a town where fairy tales come to life and attack.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians are forced to intercede when a group of competitive high school students start undercutting each other with witchcraft.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians encounter the house behind the legend of all haunted houses and set out to destroy it.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: A caretaker beneath a metropolitan library protects magical artifacts from those who would use them to do evil.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The team scatters and each person begins living the ideal version of their life; the appearance of Ariel brings everyone together to investigate.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians discover that Prospero's magic is wreaking havoc with the technology of the world; Flynn and Baird must travel back to 1611, while the rest of the team battles Prospero in the present.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Egyptian God of Chaos inhabits a human, and tries to release pure evil into the world; the librarians must decipher clues in a science museum.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn leads the others on a rescue mission, which leads them into a subterranean trap filled with ancient Egyptian werewolves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: A routine artifact retrieval becomes complicated when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra; a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: After seeing a vision of her own death at the hands of a supernatural assassin, Baird attempts to stop the deadly prophecy from coming true.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Two days after Angelina's wedding, the girls are at major odds over the speech heard around the world. And Mike "The Situation" becomes "The Mediation" in hopes of bringing the family back together.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: In the midst of a global pandemic the girls continue to social distance, but it's not because of COVID-19, and Pauly is full of surprises as the roomies learn he's not quarantining alone.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The countdown to Angelina's arrival is on and the guys need to figure out how to break the news to Deena. Meanwhile, the squad tries to play matchmaker by creating a dating show for Single Ronnie.

programme.desc: Hosted by dating show experts: DJ Pauly D and Vinny Guadagnino, 6 girls will compete for the love of the ultimate bachelor, Ronnie Magro, on the brand new dating show, "A trouble shot at love.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The double book comes full circle as Angelina touches down In lake Las Vegas. But her arrival has Deena on edge, Vinny ducking punches, and The Situation overwhelmed.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The situation forgets the plan at dinner, and then forgets he's on a TV show. And a text from back home rattles the roommates and threatens to blow the whole vacation up.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly scrambles to get Deena and Angelina on board with a family dinner before Nikki arrives. But a mob of raccoons almost foils his plan. Meanwhile, back in Jersey, Jenni is having some major fomo.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in the big green fire truck, with every intention of changing the color and look. But he’s not using paint… he’s using a vinyl wrap! If you’ve ever wondered what the deal is with vinyl wraps and if it is a good thing to do to your project, you need to see this show! But that’s not all, as the wrap is going on, Stacey also takes the time to show how to restore and bring back to life your accessories and trim without spending a lot of money.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: If you’ve been around cars very much, you’ve heard the term “barn find”. It depicts that “diamond in the rough” vehicle that everybody wants to find. Stacey delves into the barn find phenomenon and unveils what could be the ultimate barn find… the lost Richard Petty Car! Follow the incredible story of the car that Richard and Maurice Petty built in their early days, that was then sold and disappeared for decades... only to be found by Stacey and returned to Richard Petty so it could take its rightful place in the Petty Museum. It’s gearhead archeology at its best, and you’ll only see it on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey hits the road to visit a GEARZNation member to see if he can lend a hand on his project. The owner is a 16-year-old kid and the subject is his ’96 Dodge pickup that’s looking a little rough from years of use and abuse. That quickly changes as Stacey jumps in to help give the truck a new face, and at the same time offers tips and tricks to breathe a breath of fresh air into the project. See what a difference some time, expertise, and a few parts can make on a beat up old truck! After that, Stacey takes a look at the amazing Moduline Cabinets, and digs into what makes them so great.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey shows you how to tackle the one restoration project that everybody dreams of doing one day... the frame off restoration! You’ll be surprised how simple a job like this can be if you follow his simple tips and tricks and plan the project out properly. In the world of high dollar builds, a simple frame off restoration can get you back on the road enjoying your car or truck and at a fraction of the price. But to get a grasp on how to do it, you have to see this show. After that, Stacey swaps some licks with recording artist Casey James who just happens to be a gearhead at heart… all here… all Gearz!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: So, you think you want some custom bumpers for your big ol’ truck? Stacey shows you how to find what you’re looking for in the aftermarket, and also how to fabricate and build your own custom mounts to make ‘em sit exactly where you want them. After that he digs into the history of the Sgt. Rock truck and how it is permanently connected to “the greatest generation”. But this truck isn’t just about WWII, as a special tailgate airbrushed by Mickey Harris reveals, It’s about the men and women that have sacrificed for the freedoms we enjoy today. This is one show that will have you waving the flag!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey hits the road to help out a Gearz Nation member with his ‘56 Corvette project. Since the guy really wants to drive the car, putting in a modern 5 or 6spd tranny would be really nice. But which one? Well, we not only answer that question, but also give the guy a little helping hand with the transmission too. If you’ve ever wished Stacey made house calls, this is the show to see. After that we take a look at some serious questions that people ask about becoming a tool dealer and if it’s really worth it. You wanted to know… we got the answers for you!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey dives into the world of the sleeper, by taking a non-descript ’73 Plymouth Satellite, and begins transforming it into a street pounding monster under the skin. Gone is the lethargic 318 engine and front suspension, and in its place Stacey begins fitting a new state of the art performance suspension. It you are into surprising people at stop lights and run-what-you-brung race nights, then a “Street Sweeper” just might be the sort of approach you want to take on your next project.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: If you could only do one upgrade on your vehicle, that would make the biggest impact on the looks and drivability, what would it be? Stacey answers that question by installing a Katzkin leather interior into a Jeep Compass, and showing that if you’ve got an open weekend and a few hundred bucks, you can do the same thing on your car or truck. After that, he jumps back onto the Street Sweeper project to lay out the interior and the rearend, and finally drop that huge Hemi into place. If you’ve ever thought it would be fun to build a sleeper car, this is one ’73 Plymouth Satellite that shows how it can be done!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey tackles power gains at the air intake, modifies the computer and replaces the stock exhaust before addressing a 2” front-end suspension lift kit. He moves on to give the truck some extra height and support in the rear of the truck where payload weight can be a serious issue. After the suspension is in place, new wheels and tires bring the truck back down to the ground. Stacey also covers several tools that will help you get that old exhaust out from under your vehicle.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey tells the story of the legendary Cheetah and how that car was designed to beat Shelby’s famed Cobra. The GEARZ hunt for this iconic race car features the original ’63 Cheetah that Budd Clusserath drove 215 mph at Daytona in ‘64. But the story doesn’t end there, because Stacey gets his hands on a Cheetah Evolution and shows you how to build your own version of this tire shredding cat! After that, you’ll see Steering wheel options from Grant, a serpentine belt system from LMC Truck, and Wizard products to make your vehicle come alive, as well as a quick tip to get things rolling in your shop. All this and more on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Moving deeper into the build of the Cheetah Evolution, Stacey and the crew pull the skin off this cat and start putting in the guts. Overviews of suspension, steering, and brakes get this project up and running. Moving into the heart of this beast, Stacey shows us that good things do come in small packages—the LSX 454 small block is sure to get your pulse rate up. And once the transmission is mounted, look out! Headers follow, and this cat is almost ready to run. Stacey’s tool tech will give you a lift… all this and more on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: A road trip, an overview of the Cheetah interior including seat and dash installation, rear lights and a tool tech. The GearZ crew heads out on the prowl to visit a budding young mechanic with a passion for 4X4’s. Back in the garage, Stacey gets in tight with the Cheetah, installing seats and the dash. Selecting gauges and placement are discussed, an AC unit will help keep this cat cool, taillights are fitted, and the side pipes will give this Cheetah some growl! Stacey’s tool tech will keep your project on time and on budget. And Fast Orange cleans more than your hands. All this on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Auction cars and what you might really find out once the car is in your garage: suspension, brakes and electrical concerns. In the current fad of “flipping” cars for cash, Stacey takes on the good, bad, and ugly of a ’66 Biscayne that was bought at auction. Nice looking paint can’t hide the safety issues that are found once this car is put on the lift. From suspension, to brakes, to battery cables… and even down to the lug nuts, this auction beauty turns out to be more of a beast. Safety and sport-style handling are only a few repairs away this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey and the crew head north to celebrate 40 years of Heartthrob Exhaust and see just how far this company has come since its modest beginnings in a garage. After that we dig into a cracked dash and show how easy it is to replace one yourself with some aftermarket parts from LMC Truck, and then we look at a painless solution will help clean up years of spliced wires and old electrical tape that might be lurking under your hood. It’s simple gearhead stuff that everybody needs to know and it’s only on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey digs back into the Cheetah project by finishing up the stance with custom wheels and tires, and then goes through the ins and outs of putting a classic Hilborn fuel injection on a modern LS engine… and the dyno numbers show that the engine likes it as much as you will! After that Stacey sits down with a budding car designer that is making a big impact everywhere he goes and there’s also a tip on the importance of seals and gaskets. It’s all about getting out and turning wrenches, and you’re only gonna find it on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey explores the history of the legendary Jaguar D-type racecar and introduces a D-type Jag from Race Car Replicas that is sure to become a legend of its own. From race wheels to classic spoke wheels with true knock-offs, Stacey looks at options for getting the best look and most rubber on the road with this Jag. A tip might keep you from losing your mind when dealing with lug nuts that don’t want to budge and we talk shop about performance parts for your own cars. So, come hang out while we take on a legendary cat of a different color this week on GearZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey and the crew hit the ground running with a late model replacement bed from LMC that’s sure to revive and old Ford farm truck and get it out of the pastures and back on the highway. Then it’s off to show budding Jeep enthusiasts a couple of entry level options they can use when it comes to modifying their vehicle. We get a visit from a couple who learn how to install new seat upholstery. Stacey’s found something cool for all you second generation Camaro owners. And we’re just getting started! So get ready to turn some wrenches on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The GearZ crew and Cornwell Tools team up to help a new shop in Arkansas get some much-needed tools to help them take they’re shop the next level. Then Stacey puts together the final pieces of the Sgt. Rock project by making a trip to France and the beaches of Normandy. Then it’s back to the shop to show you how easy it is to put fuel injection on your muscle car. It’s all here… and only on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Season 10 Starts off with America’s favorite military tribute truck! Sgt. Rock is back and ready for final assembly! Garage Guru, Stacey David, takes us on a tour de force of custom fabrication as he covers all the nuts and bolts of what it’s taken to get Sgt. Rock ready to rumble. Builders of all levels are in for a great show as Stacey tackles one of a kind steering columns, gas pedals and designing a console that not only fits form, but also function. Gauge techs will keep your instrument panels in line. And a quick tip will keep your wires from fraying and your hoses from splitting. All this and more as Sgt. Rock and Season 10 hit the road full throttle.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: A custom build can lose some power if the theme doesn’t stay consistent. Stacey shows how to do that by taking you through the process of how to make door and kick panels that keep the rugged military WWII bomber vibe flowing throughout the interior of Sgt. Rock. After that, its some tips on how to fit a radiator and that all-important cooling fan in a place where space is limited. Finally, the gas tank and battery placement are critical on a custom vehicle and Stacey goes through the steps in doing that as well. If you’ve always wanted to build a custom vehicle, this episode is sure to get your fabrication gearZ turning.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Two things are certain in life: death and taxes. We all know what to do with taxes, but what happens when a loved one passes and leaves behind an unfinished project vehicle? How do you know what’s sitting in your garage? And how can you find out? Stacey tackles these questions and takes you on a thorough inventory of an almost finished restoration that was left to a widow when her husband suddenly died. A new dash going into your vehicle? A gauge tech should keep you from crossing your wires. And we’ve got tips that should help with battery relocation and lining up your vehicle’s body panels.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The GearZ crew mount up and head out to visit a young gear-head whose love of wrenching started with 4-wheelers and has grown to include 4-wheel drive pick ups. Young Adam has a few surprises in store as Stacey visits him in his Dad’s garage and discusses tools, storage and tearing apart things to see how they work. Then, it’s back in the shop as Stacey takes on the big question every gear-head has: What OTHER tools should I have in my box? A look beyond the typical wrenches, hammers and clamps will show you what you may need and what you may not, depending on your project.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The son of legendary car builder, Bill Thomas, talks shop about wrenching, racing and his father’s Cobra Killer…the Cheetah. Then Stacey heads over to Stainless Works to check out how the Cheetah’s custom side pipes, headers and mufflers came together. A Gauge Tech explains the pros and cons of mechanical vs. electric gauges. After that, a Quick Tip explains the proper way to use some of those mystery tools laying around in your tool box.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Ever wonder why your wife or best buddy won’t step foot in your late model truck? It could be that crusty interior. Tag along as Stacey takes on the sights and smells of an ’83 Chevy in dire need of some attention. From new dash to leather on the bench seat and new carpet in the floor, Stacey shows you what a difference a weekend and some parts from LMC can make. Speaking of trucks, Stacey raises the bar with a bed lifter that will make you the most popular guy in your neighborhood. A new buffer is going to help add some shine to your vehicle and a creeper that’s simply “Magic” is sure to raise an eyebrow or two. Big things are happening in the garage this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Through the years, we’ve had some amazing vehicles featured on GearZ—from elite racecars to the insanity of a V-8 barstool. Well, here we go again! Stacey hauls in a Thiokol Imp that needs some…attention. First things first with this crazy snowcatmobile; we’ve got to see if we can make it run. Follow along as Stacey takes you through the ins and outs of getting a neglected vehicle up and running again. For you performance BMW guys, a tuner from Dinan is going add the horses you’ve been looking for. We’ve got sparks flying, fuel splashing and all kinds of garage mayhem this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: In the world of car building there are few things more ominous than missing titles or VIN numbers. But there is one task that stands out, one that brings grown men to tears, one that is usually lurking behind 100 yards of electrical tape…WIRING. Well hold on tight as Stacey dives head first into wiring Sergeant Rock. That’s right; see how painless Stacey can make wiring the big old truck. Follow along as Stacey moves front to back and gets the Rock one step closer to hitting the road!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: With summer in full swing, it’s time to cool down that classic truck of yours. That’s right, roll those windows up and feel the cool breeze as Stacey shows just how easy it is to install this complete AC system from LMC Truck. Now that you’re done sweatin’, let’s take a look at headers and intakes and get that motor performing the way it should. And don’t miss out on the ins and outs of turbos and super-chargers…which one fits your needs? All this and plenty of sparks in the garage this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey and the GearZ crew heat things up as they head to the Cornwell forges to watch molten steel be expertly transformed into America’s best ratchet. Get ready to see sparks fly. But the trip doesn’t stop there. Tag along as the crew follows what it takes for a ratchet to end up on a Cornwell truck. Back in the garage, Stacey talks maximizing boost and the role of intercoolers when it comes to super-chargers and turbos. The wheels keep turning and the rubber keeps burning, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Cheetah lovers will be excited to see Stacey’s solution to keeping the headers both cool and looking red hot. Want to keep using your stock tank after converting to fuel injection? Get psyched, because Holley has a new fuel pump that’s going to make your life a whole lot easier. Think your car is buttoned up tight? Stacey and some friends from Redline Detection blow smoke at the old soap and water test and show you how to really test for leaks in your vehicle. It’s a world of problems out there, but Stacey’s got you covered in the garage. All this and more, this week, on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: This week Stacey and crew head to Memphis, TN to help out a local BBQ pitmaster who’s deep into a ground up rebuild of a ’72 Nova. The big challenge here?...Can you swap out an automatic transmission with a manual without losing your mind? Well, Stacey is always up for a good challenge and he’ll show you just how simple this swap can be. A new tuner from Super chips will make your Jeep life easier, and replacement dashes for Chevy owners are going to light up their eyes. There’s a lot going on in the garage this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We’re winding up the tenth season of GearZ, and what a season it’s been! But we’ve got some business to take care of before we move onto season eleven. First things first…Holley just made an EFI even easier to install on your carbureted vehicle, and Stacey will show you just how on target the Sniper is. The Thiokol Imp gets a suspension upgrade to keep it on track. And there’s a new kind of off-roading that’s sweeping the nation…see what RC4WD has going on. And what season would be complete without guitars? Check out Tennessee Electric Company as Stacey introduces a new guitar-maker whose custom guitars are hotter than the asphalt at the drag strip.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We’re back and taking it to the streets! Season 11 comes roaring back with a look at Super Lite Cars on the road and the track! Stacey recalls and earlier SLC build and introduces two SLC builders who took a very hands-on approach to putting their cars together. These street/race cars are sure to catch your eye and get your racing blood flowing. If there’s one thing Stacey preaches on every episode, it’s paying attention to the details. His quick tip is no exception, getting rid of those sharp edges and nasty welds to give your project the small details that people will notice. Side mirrors for a muscle car, building a better battery, and keeping your air flowing through carbon fiber vents fill out the parts bin. We’ve got all this and more as Stacey kicks of his 11th season of GearZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: This is the moment you’ve been waiting for! Master car builder, Stacey David, shows off the truck that’s had the nation talking for ten years! Take a look back at the kid with the dream. Follow the design and fabrication. See what happens when the military tribute vehicle rolls out and conquers the road! This episode is gonna be epic. It’s been a long road, but anything worth doing well is worth the wait. This week, the wait is over. Sergeant Rock Lives!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Things are rockin’ and rollin’ in and out of the GearZ garage. Stacey hits the road to find a project build that will get gear heads buzzing. He ends up with an ’81 Camaro and some awesome stories from the seller. If you’re talking project vehicles, you’ve got to talk paint! And Stacey does just that with folks from Unicure, who specialize in paint booths and helping you get set up for that all important paint job. The V-8 Interceptor is back from a trip to Stainless works, where a custom exhaust system was made for the big Boss Nine engine. Things are about to get loud, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey and the GearZ crew roll in an old favorite: Heavy Metal. The coolest hotrod tow truck is back in the garage and ready for a facelift. Our good friends at the Hot Rod Institute drop by and talk shop with Stacey about his plans for the paint and fab work needed to get this bad boy looking good and back on the road. Fresh from the sandblaster, the snowcat reveals the scars that were under the skin. And with the drive train out, Stacey walks through the importance of replacing gaskets, seals and checking for wear and tear before stuffing that engine, transmission and skid steer rear end back into the cat. There’s a whole lot going on this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Every gear head has a secret: they all want to drive like McQueen in Bullitt, or Vin Diesel in The Fast And The Furious. But when the heat gets turned up, even some really good drivers can’t keep up. That’s when you bring in the Stunt Double! This week Stacey sits down with legendary Hollywood stunt man Ian Quinn to talk crashing cars and keeping actors out of harms way. There’s also a new project in the garage: The Stunt Double, a build inspired by the 80’s tv show The Fall Guy, and sure to get all four wheels off the ground before Stacey’s done with it. Sparks are going to fly and you know we’re gonna have a good time this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Seems like you can’t go more than a block these days without running into someone whose had some work done on their face. Well, here at the GearZ garage, Stacey believes in facelifts too. Just to prove it, he’s taken on a 1981 Camaro and sharpened his scalpel to perform an automotive nose job. Just wait till you see him whack of the old rubber nose and replace it with a 71’ rally sport front end! Now that’s what we call a facelift. Plenty of people said it couldn’t be done, but that’s just the kind of challenge Stacey is up for. Plenty of sparks are gonna fly, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: They say that true change comes from within… Well, this week Stacey turns his attention to the interior of the Stunt Double. The old, crusty junk hits the floor and our Fall Guy inspired build gets a new look: from painting trim and door panels, to a new bench seat. Man o’ man, this truck is starting to look completely different. A shower of sparks lights up the garage as Stacey demonstrates how to make a bracket that mounts our new bench seat to the truck while using the stock seat adjustment. It’s a tour de force of aftermarket parts and salvaging what we’ve got, this week on GearZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: When you’re putting together a project that’s inspired by a high-flying stunt truck, you know you’ve got to add some lift, and our Stunt Double gets the goods this week. The front and rear suspension get treated to a 6” lift to get that rig up in the air. But a good lift won’t do any good if the steering and frame can’t hold up, so Stacey shows you how Offroad Design has fixed some serious issues that many late model four-wheel drives encounter. Bed need to come off your truck, but the carriage bolts are rusted and spinning? Stacey’s got a fix for that too. There’s a lot going on, and we’ve got you covered, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Everyone needs a little boost here and there. For some people, coffee does the trick. But here in the GearZ Garage we take our boost seriously. And we like ours packing 160 HP. Hang on to your seat as Stacey adds a bolt on Supercharger to a Ram 1500 breathes a little excitement into a daily driver. And speaking of things going on in the garage, you’ll definitely want to stick around as Stacey talks shop with the guys at Rebuilding Generations. Learn all about how this mentoring program is teaching the next generation about working on cars and sharing plenty of life lessons. We’ve got a lot going on this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We’re running full steam ahead as the Stunt Double rolls back into the shop this week! First, Stacey reveals the wheels and tires that are going to accentuate that 6” lift, then He dives headlong into the drivetrain of this beast and comes up with a hot crate engine and a high-performance transmission to get the Stunt Double ready for the road. But that’s not all…. We also take some time out for a visit with the guys from American Powertrain and so much more. Check out the sparks flying in the garage this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s business as usual in the garage this week. We’re back at work on the Catalog Camaro and really diggin’ into the front end. You know what they say, “out with the old and in with the new,” and that’s exactly what Stacey’s doing. The old sub frame, drivetrain, and suspension are hitting the garage floor in favor of a much-needed updated suspension system that’ll keep this awesome Camaro hugging the road at high speeds—From the wheels to the sub frame, Stacey’s replacing it all. And he’s not going to break the bank while doing it, either. Follow the GearZ crew as they hit the road and visit Cornwell Tools to see their latest and greatest tool box being manufactured. From powder coat to knuckle bustin’ bolts, we’ve got you covered this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: This episode of Nomads follows some of the biggest names in freestyle motocross, and Ogio team athletes, as they prepare for stop four on the ‘Dew Action Sports Tour,’ being held in Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Head to the Whistler ski resort for the second Crankworx Mountain Bike Festival. Top pros and riders of all types from all over the world meet up for five days of racing, partying and lift service riding.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: In this episode of Nomads, the Long Brothers, two renowned surfers from San Clemente, California, surf their home breaks and venture to Mexico’s famous Todos Santo in search of giant tow-in surf to test their skill, experience and abilities in the ultimate proving grounds.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Pro snowmobilers ride on the edge; tackling uncharted terrain, risky terrain for the ultimate freeride snowmobile experience in the uncharted mountains of Valdez, Alaska.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Follow a group of skiers as they chase elusive winter storms around the western US.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: In this first part of a two part journey, American adventurers embark on a trip of a lifetime to explore the uncharted watershed of China's Sichuan province and to experience the different cultures China has to offer.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Part two of the journey reveals another part of the reason the American adventurers came to China. To be ambassadors for the sport of kayaking.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Paragliding in one of the most beautiful places in the world.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Four pro skiers travel to Montana with snowmobiles in search of remote backcountry lines and deep powder to ski.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: A glimpse into the world of freestyle motocross.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: This episode of Nomads goes south to the far reaches of Chile’s lush and unpopulated landscape in search of the most challenging white water and the largest waterfall drops in and around the area of Pucon.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Valdez, Alaska is the birthplace of Heli skiing. Professional skiers migrate to these mountains year after year to test themselves in the ultimate arena. Every once in a while there are a lucky few who get to experience Alaska for the first time.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: BASE jumping, an introductory adventure into the personalities, techniques, and lifestyles of the sport.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: In this episode of NOMADS, pilot Mike Castillo takes a one of a kind surf vessel, the Billabong Clipper, down the Baja coastline in search of ultimate waves bringing with him professional surfers-Shane Dorian, Andy Irons, Dave Rastovich and others.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure

programme.title: The Christmas Kid

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus only daughter wants to experience the real world before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Hillary Burns (Somerville) is always struggling in life and love while constantly feeling the pressure to marry from her demanding mother, Meredith (Long).

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date

programme.desc: A puzzle box summons the Cenobites, destroying a family (Andrew Robinson, Clare Higgins, Ashley Laurence).

programme.title: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: Hollywood screenwriter Don Malek (Stephen Geoffreys) holes up in a seedy hotel and scripts a diabolical plan for revenge using his own hands.

programme.title: Burying the Ex
programme.desc: A horror fan's (Anton Yelchin) dead girlfriend (Ashley Greene) comes back as a zombie and wants to continue their relationship forever.

programme.title: Return to Horror High
programme.desc: A film crew is stalked by a psychotic killer while shooting at a school infamous for a rash of murders five years before.

programme.title: The Evil in Us
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life on a remote island when a mysterious drug turns her fiance and four friends into bloodthirsty cannibals.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: A professor investigates three chilling and inexplicable cases related to an abandoned asylum, a car accident and the spirit of an unborn child. Even scarier -- each of the macabre tales seems to have a sinister connection to his own life.

programme.title: Wildling
programme.desc: After a childhood in captivity under the care of a man who taught her to fear the outside world, a young woman sees her new freedom shattered by a series of unsettling events.

programme.title: Killing Ground
programme.desc: Sam and Ian take off on what they believe will be a peaceful camping trip. Their break turns into a battle for survival when they discover a bloody toddler wandering around in the bush and find that an incredibly disturbing crime has been committed.

programme.desc: A horror fan's (Anton Yelchin) dead girlfriend (Ashley Greene) comes back as a zombie and wants to continue their relationship forever.
